title: Amazon Bedrock introduces new advanced prompt optimization and migration tool
summary: Amazon Bedrock Advanced Prompt Optimization enables customers to optimize their prompts for their current model or migrate prompts to new models faster than before with built-in evaluation feedback loops. Optimize your prompts and compare results for up to 5 models simultaneously.
author: Channy Yun (윤석찬)

title: Can AI replicate an army of associates? These lawyers are betting their new firm on it
summary: Talairis Law Group is built around the idea that AI can handle much of the work that associates at big law firms have traditionally done — and that startups shouldn't have to pay big law prices for it. Read More
author: Kurt Schlosser

title: AI can take the friction out of life, but some effort can be good
summary: Technologies, including chatbots, promise to make life easier. But removing the friction, or effort involved in thinking, has costs.

title: Why Most SIEM/SOAR Integrations Break — and How to Fix Them by Dale O’Grady
